TestCase z10Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_p1 = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_p1, t1.p1, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.p1 = follow_case_p1;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element to process
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation: replace Inf with maximum double value
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        if (isinf(follow_case.p1[i])) {
            follow_case.p1[i] = std::numeric_limits<double>::max();
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
